title: SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of a SKILL.md file. Body content following the frontmatter is unconstrained markdown.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier. Unique within the agent's skill registry.

name.description: Human-readable label. Used in traces and the picker hint line.

description.description: One-line purpose summary. The LLM judge reads this when picking.

when_to_use.description: Optional one-line activation hint. Complements description for the judge.

triggers.description: Lowercase keywords or phrases that hint when the skill applies. Stage 1 matcher uses these as substring patterns.

mcp_servers.description: Capability ids of MCP servers this skill depends on.

tools.description: In-process tool names this skill expects to be available.

scripts.description: Helper script paths relative to the skill directory.

roles.description: Role names allowed to use this skill. Omit to delegate to global grant policy.

metadata.description: Free-form authoring metadata (author, tags, test_prompt, etc.).
